mapper.select: SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.USER_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, CASE WHEN A.DOG_GENDER = 'M' THEN '수컷' WHEN A.DOG_GENDER = 'F' THEN '암컷' END AS DOG_GENDER, A.DOG_AGE, A.DOG_WEIGHT, TO_CHAR(A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS DOG_SAFE_DATE, A.DOG_DETAIL, S.DOG_ACTIVITY, S.DOG_SOCIALITY, S.DOG_INDEPENDENCE, S.DOG_BARKING, S.DOG_GROOMING, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_SCORE S ON A.DOG_NUMBER = S.DOG_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER AND AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER = ( SELECT MIN(AI2.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI2 WHERE AI2.DOG_NUMBER = A.DOG_NUMBER ) WHERE A.DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber};

SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.USER_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, A.DOG_GENDER, A.DOG_AGE, A.DOG_WEIGHT, TO_CHAR(A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DOG_SAFE_DATE, A.DOG_DETAIL, S.DOG_ACTIVITY, S.DOG_SOCIALITY, S.DOG_INDEPENDENCE, S.DOG_BARKING, S.DOG_GROOMING, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_SCORE S ON A.DOG_NUMBER = S.DOG_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER AND AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER = ( SELECT MIN(AI2.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI2 WHERE AI2.DOG_NUMBER = A.DOG_NUMBER ) WHERE A.DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber} AND (A.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} OR #{adminNumber} IS NOT NULL);
mapper.update: UPDATE DDD_ARCHIVE SET DOG_NAME = #{dogName}, DOG_BREED = #{dogBreed}, DOG_GENDER = #{dogGender}, DOG_AGE = #{dogAge}, DOG_WEIGHT = #{dogWeight}, DOG_SAFE_DATE = TO_DATE(#{dogSafeDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DOG_DETAIL = #{dogDetail}, ARCHIVE_MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber} AND (USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} OR #{adminNumber} IS NOT NULL);

UPDATE DDD_ARCHIVE_SCORE SET DOG_ACTIVITY = #{dogActivity}, DOG_SOCIALITY = #{dogSociality}, DOG_INDEPENDENCE = #{dogIndependence}, DOG_BARKING = #{dogBarking}, DOG_GROOMING = #{dogGrooming} WHERE DOG_NUMBER = #{dogNumber};
mapper.select: SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, US.SHELTER_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS DOG_SAFE_DATE, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A JOIN DDD_USER_SHELTER US ON A.USER_NUMBER = US.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER AND AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER = ( SELECT MIN(AI2.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI2 WHERE AI2.DOG_NUMBER = A.DOG_NUMBER ) ORDER BY A.DOG_NUMBER DESC;

SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, US.SHELTER_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS DOG_SAFE_DATE, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A JOIN DDD_USER_SHELTER US ON A.USER_NUMBER = US.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER AND AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER = ( SELECT MIN(AI2.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI2 WHERE AI2.DOG_NUMBER = A.DOG_NUMBER ) WHERE US.SHELTER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{shelterName} || '%' ORDER BY A.DOG_NUMBER DESC;

SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, US.SHELTER_NAME, TO_CHAR(A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS DOG_SAFE_DATE, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A JOIN DDD_USER_SHELTER US ON A.USER_NUMBER = US.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON A.DOG_NUMBER = AI.DOG_NUMBER AND AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER = ( SELECT MIN(AI2.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI2 WHERE AI2.DOG_NUMBER = A.DOG_NUMBER ) WHERE A.DOG_BREED LIKE '%' || #{dogBreed} || '%' ORDER BY A.DOG_NUMBER DESC;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_ARCHIVE ( DOG_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, DOG_NAME, DOG_BREED, DOG_GENDER, DOG_AGE, DOG_WEIGHT, DOG_SAFE_DATE, DOG_ARCHIVE_DATE, DOG_DETAIL ) VALUES ( SEQ_DDD_ARCHIVE.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{dogName}, #{dogBreed}, #{dogGender}, #{dogAge}, #{dogWeight}, TO_DATE(#{dogSafeDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SYSDATE, #{dogDetail} );

INSERT INTO DDD_ARCHIVE_SCORE ( DOG_NUMBER, DOG_ACTIVITY, DOG_SOCIALITY, DOG_INDEPENDENCE, DOG_BARKING, DOG_GROOMING ) VALUES ( #{dogNumber}, #{dogActivity}, #{dogSociality}, #{dogIndependence}, #{dogBarking}, #{dogGrooming} );
